title: Music Disc Renderer
description: This mod tries to render the Music Disc item that is put into a jukebox
body:
Music Disc Renderer(MDR) renders the Record Item (Music Disc) in the slot on top of the Jukebox Block.

**IMPORTANT NOTICE:**
This mod won't work when playing on Multiplayer, unless the mod is installed on the server too.
But it shouldn't cause any issues having the mod installed.
If you know how to fix that issue, please contact me on my discord server: [John Adept - Minecraft Modding](https://discord.gg/bFxV5B7srW)

![ingame view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b3623228b436a1438edf3226059ff5f56e679e2.png)

Since mod version 2.0, this mod supports the mod "[More Jukebox/Noteblock Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-jukebox-noteblock-variants)"
